query:
-- 1. Contact trust tier breakdown
SELECT contactTrustTier, COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts
GROUP BY contactTrustTier
ORDER BY count DESC;

-- 2. Enrichment source breakdown
SELECT enrichmentSource, COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts
WHERE enrichmentSource IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY enrichmentSource
ORDER BY count DESC;

-- 3. Stale project count (projects with no activity signal recently)
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN isStale = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as stale_projects,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isStale = 0 OR isStale IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_projects,
  SUM(CASE WHEN suppressed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as suppressed_projects
FROM projects;

-- 4. Projects with NO send_ready contacts (blocking digest delivery)
SELECT COUNT(*) as projects_with_no_send_ready_contact
FROM projects p
WHERE (p.suppressed = 0 OR p.suppressed IS NULL)
  AND p.isStale = 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM contacts c
    JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
    WHERE cp.projectId = p.id
    AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  );

-- 5. DigestSafe promotion status
SELECT digestSafe, COUNT(*) as count
FROM projects
WHERE (suppressed = 0 OR suppressed IS NULL) AND isStale = 0
GROUP BY digestSafe;
